name: Loop Start
description: Begin a loop. Iterates over an array or a fixed number of times.
doc:
Begin an iteration loop.

Loop Modes:
• Count - run N times (1, 2, 3...)
• For Each - iterate over array items
• While True - loop until stopped by condition

Outputs:
• Item - current array item (For Each) or iteration number
• Index - 1-based iteration count

Usage:
Place Loop End node to mark where the loop body ends. Results from each iteration are collected into an array.

Tip: Name your loops for clarity when using nested loops.

inputs.name: Array
inputs.description: Array to iterate over (or connect iterations count)

properties.name: Iterations
properties.description: Number of iterations (if no array connected)
